research_question: Do seasoned listed companies outperform young post-IPO companies after fixed board and liquidity matching?
null_hypothesis: The mean monthly net return of the seasoned side minus the paired young side is not positive.

sources: Loughran and Ritter 1995, Journal of Finance, DOI 10.1111/j.1540-6261.1995.tb05166.x
Chan, Wang and Wei 2004, Journal of Corporate Finance, DOI 10.1016/S0929-1199(03)00023-3
economic_prior.limitation: The three-year and five-year thresholds, exclusion gap, pair count and liquidity matching are preregistered researcher design choices, not causal identification or a literal paper replication.

universe.ts_code_use: opaque identity and deterministic tie-break only; never inspect digits for signal or grouping
universe.decision_date: last accepted session of each calendar month
universe.formation_window: decision date and prior 19 accepted sessions
universe.candidate_input_rule: candidate needs all 20 amount rows plus positive adj_factor, accepted row hash, accepted quality status and non-synthetic identity; missing candidates are excluded before pairing and counted only in aggregate

age_feature.anniversary_rule: add calendar years to list_date; clamp February 29 or any invalid day to the last valid day of the same target month

matching.liquidity_measure: median amount over the exact 20-session formation window
matching.within_board: sort each age side by median amount descending then opaque ts_code ascending; pair equal ordinals
matching.pair_pool_order: minimum of both median amounts descending, then young ts_code, then seasoned ts_code

return_screen.strategy: equal-weight simple qfq_open return of the 50 seasoned securities
return_screen.comparator: equal-weight simple qfq_open return of the paired 50 young securities
return_screen.entry: first accepted session after decision date
return_screen.exit: first accepted session after the next calendar month-end
return_screen.selected_panel_rule: entry and exit qfq_open must be finite positive and both rows need finite positive adj_factor, accepted row hash, accepted quality status and non-synthetic identity; otherwise the interval is input-blocked
return_screen.scope_limit: synthetic retrospective screen only; no account, cash, shares, lots, capacity, fills, blocked orders, corporate-action, PIT execution or recommendation claim

splits.cross_boundary_rule: purge and aggregate-count every interval whose entry and exit do not remain inside one split

inference.lower_bound: observed mean minus linearly interpolated (1-alpha) quantile of centered bootstrap means

strict_gates: split minimum and validation maximum interval counts pass
zero invalid intervals and exactly 50 pairs per interval
active one-sided p-value is at most 1/60
active lower confidence bound is positive
seasoned annualized net return exceeds young annualized net return
historical_sequential_access: Compute and adjudicate validation first; only an accepted validation PASS may open the retrospective holdout. Development is diagnostic and prospective forward remains closed.

outcome_free_preflight.status_precedence: INPUT_BLOCKED for frozen identity or selected-panel defects; otherwise STRUCTURAL_FAIL for pairing, split or interval thresholds; otherwise PREFLIGHT_PASS
